title: AI-Powered Social Media Content Automation System — Clothing Brand Prototype

requirements.text: Create a brand profile setup page where the user can input their clothing brand identity: brand name, logo upload, brand tone/voice (e.g., casual, luxury, streetwear), target audience, and a simple product catalog (product name, category, description). Store this profile data in the backend.

quotes: AI-Powered Social Media Content Automation System for a Small Clothing Retail Brand

acceptanceCriteria: User can fill out and save a brand profile form with name, tone, audience, and product catalog entries
Brand profile data is persisted in the Motoko backend
Saved profile data loads correctly on return visits

requirements.text: Build an AI content generation page where users can select a product from their catalog, choose a target platform (Instagram, Facebook, Twitter/X, TikTok), and generate a simulated AI-crafted social media post including a caption and relevant hashtags. Simulate AI generation with template-based logic in the backend using brand tone and product details.

quotes: AI-powered content generation for social media posts (captions, hashtags, etc.)

acceptanceCriteria: User can select a product and a platform to generate a post
Generated output includes a caption and hashtags tailored to the selected platform's character/style conventions
Brand tone from the profile influences generated content
Generated posts can be saved for scheduling

requirements.text: Implement a content scheduling system with a calendar view. Users can assign generated (or manually written) posts to specific dates and times for each platform. Store scheduled posts in the backend with status: draft, scheduled, or published.

quotes: Content scheduling and calendar view for planned posts

acceptanceCriteria: Calendar view displays scheduled posts grouped by date
User can assign a post to a date, time, and platform
Post status cycles through draft → scheduled → published
Scheduled posts are persisted and retrievable from the backend

requirements.text: Build a main dashboard that displays an analytics overview with simulated performance metrics per platform: total posts published, estimated reach, engagement rate, and top-performing post. Include platform filter tabs for Instagram, Facebook, Twitter/X, and TikTok.

quotes: Dashboard with analytics and performance metrics for social media posts

acceptanceCriteria: Dashboard is the default landing page after login
Simulated metrics are shown per platform with platform filter tabs
At least 4 metric cards are displayed (posts, reach, engagement, top post)
A recent activity feed shows the last 5 scheduled or published posts

requirements.text: Apply a bold, fashion-forward visual theme throughout the entire app. Use a dark neutral base (near-black or deep charcoal) with a warm accent color (coral, terracotta, or amber), clean sans-serif typography, and generous whitespace. The layout should feel like a premium SaaS tool for creative brand owners. Enforce this theme consistently across all pages and components.
acceptanceCriteria: All pages share the same color palette and typography
Dark base background with warm accent colors is applied site-wide
Navigation sidebar or top bar is present on all authenticated pages
The design feels polished and appropriate for a fashion/retail brand tool

requirements.text: Render the generated hero banner image and platform icons as static assets from frontend/public/assets/generated. Use the hero banner on the dashboard header and platform icons in the scheduling and analytics views.
acceptanceCriteria: Hero banner image is displayed in the dashboard header section
Platform icons for Instagram, Facebook, Twitter/X, and TikTok are displayed consistently wherever platforms are referenced

constraints: No real social media API integrations — all platform publishing is simulated/prototype only
No real AI/LLM calls — content generation must be simulated using template-based logic in Motoko
All state must be stored in the Motoko single-actor backend
Do not modify any files listed in frontend.immutablePaths
nonGoals: Actual OAuth connection to Instagram, Facebook, Twitter/X, or TikTok APIs
Real AI/ML model integration or external API calls to LLMs
Image generation for social media posts

required: Bold fashion-forward hero banner with dark charcoal background, warm coral/terracotta abstract shapes, and subtle clothing silhouettes (hero-banner.dim_1200x400.png)
Instagram platform icon in a warm coral color scheme on transparent background (icon-instagram.dim_48x48.png)
Facebook platform icon in a warm amber color scheme on transparent background (icon-facebook.dim_48x48.png)
Twitter/X platform icon in a warm terracotta color scheme on transparent background (icon-twitter.dim_48x48.png)
TikTok platform icon in a warm coral color scheme on transparent background (icon-tiktok.dim_48x48.png)
Minimalist clothing hanger logo mark in coral on dark background (brand-logo.dim_128x128.png)
